COOKIESA cookie is a small file which store some information on your computer or mobile device. Cookies are used to improve our software and give you a better experience.

decoder_heading: Cookies and similar technologies from our software are used exclusively for the following purposes:
ident_heading: Cookies and similar technologies from our software are used exclusively for the following purposes:
heading_content_part: Cookies and similar technologies from our software are used exclusively for the following purposes:

– Advertising. We show ads in our software from third party ad networks included below. For more information about the use they make of cookies follow these links:Admobhttp://www.google.com/policies/technologies/ads/Chartboosthttps://answers.chartboost.com/hc/en-us/articles/200780269-Privacy-PolicyFacebook Audience Networkhttps://www.facebook.com/help/cookies/updateMobilecorehttps://www.mobilecore.com/privacy-policy/UnityAdshttp://unity3d.com/legal/privacy-policy

– Analytics. To improve our software we use services such as Google Analytics. This service allows us to know details like the average length of sessions or the brand and model of your device. All this is collected anonymously and always without identifying the user. For more information see the use Google makes of cookies on this link:https://www.google.es/intl/es/policies/technologies/types/

Your installation and use of this product involves the collection and use of certain data by third parties, according to the terms set forth on the following third-party privacy policy:http://abgprivacy-policy.com

DISABLE COOKIESThird party ad networks may use device identifiers such as the Android advertising ID and/or Apple’s advertising ID, IDFA. This identifier is used to show interest based ads. You can disable or reset your device’s ad identifier adjusting the settings of your device.Settings may vary but usually you can find them in:iOS. Settings>Privacy>AdvertisingAndroid. Settings>Google>Ads

DATA PROTECTIONOur software does not obtain any information that could identify you. Moreover, as a general principle, we will not share or disclose information except when authorized by you or in the following cases:
